# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = historical_agitators
historical_agitators.6 = { #Charles Maurras
	type = country_event
	placement = root

	gui_window = event_window_1char_tabloid
	left_icon = scope:historic_agitator_scope

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"
	on_opened_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/Events/misc/1Character_Banner"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/waving_flag.dds"

	title = historical_agitators.6.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					has_journal_entry = je_dreyfus_affair
					any_character_in_void = {
						has_variable = alfred_dreyfus_var
					}
				}
				desc = historical_agitators.6.d1
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					NOT = { has_journal_entry = je_dreyfus_affair }
				}
				desc = historical_agitators.6.d2
			}
		}
	}
	flavor = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					has_journal_entry = je_dreyfus_affair
				}
				desc = historical_agitators.6.f1
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					NOT = { has_journal_entry = je_dreyfus_affair }
				}
				desc = historical_agitators.6.f2
			}
		}
	}

	duration = 3

	dlc = dlc004

	trigger = {
		has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
		empty_agitator_slots >= 1
		c:FRA ?= this
		game_date > 1895.1.1
		OR = {
			has_journal_entry = je_dreyfus_affair
			has_variable = dreyfus_trial_reincarceration
			has_variable = dreyfus_trial_lesser_sentence
			has_variable = dreyfus_trial_exoneration
			has_technology_researched = political_agitation
		}
		NOT = { has_global_variable = maurras_spawn }
	}

	immediate = {
		create_character = {
			template = fra_maurras_character_template
			on_created = {
				set_variable = maurras_var
				if = {
					limit = {
						owner = {
							has_journal_entry = je_divided_monarchists
						}
					}
					set_ideology = ideology:ideology_legitimist
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						owner = {
							RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						}
					}
					set_ideology = ideology:ideology_fascist
				}
				else = {
					set_ideology = ideology:ideology_traditionalist
				}
			}
		}
		random_scope_character = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = maurras_var
			}
			save_scope_as = historic_agitator_scope
		}
		set_global_variable = maurras_spawn
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_character_in_void = {
					has_variable = alfred_dreyfus_var
				}
			}
			random_character_in_void = {
				limit = {
					has_variable = alfred_dreyfus_var
				}
				save_scope_as = alfred_dreyfus_scope
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = historical_agitators.6.a
		default_option = yes
		show_as_tooltip = {
			create_character = {
				template = fra_maurras_character_template
			}
		}
		scope:historic_agitator_scope = {
			add_trait = special_character_maurras_popularity
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = historical_agitators.6.b
		show_as_tooltip = {
			create_character = {
				template = fra_maurras_character_template
			}
		}
		add_modifier = {
			name = modifier_maurras_antisemitism
			days = normal_modifier_time
		}
		capital = {
			add_religion_standard_of_living_modifier = {
				religion = rel:jewish
				multiplier = -2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = historical_agitators.6.c
		show_as_tooltip = {
			create_character = {
				template = fra_maurras_character_template
			}
		}
		add_modifier = {
			name = modifier_maurras_monarchism
			days = normal_modifier_time
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
			add_loyalists = {
				value = medium_radicals
				pop_type = shopkeepers
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_loyalists = {
				value = medium_radicals
				pop_type = shopkeepers
			}
		}
	}
}

historical_agitators.21 = { #Sun
	type = country_event
	placement = scope:sunyatsen_state

	gui_window = event_window_1char_tabloid
	left_icon = scope:historic_agitator_scope

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"
	on_opened_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/Events/misc/1Character_Banner"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_military.dds"

	title = historical_agitators.21.t
	desc = historical_agitators.21.d
	flavor = historical_agitators.21.f

	duration = 3

	dlc = dlc004

	trigger = {
		has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
		empty_agitator_slots >= 1
		OR = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		OR = {
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:han
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:manchu
		}
		game_date > 1888.1.1
		game_date < 1925.1.1
		any_scope_state = {
			any_neighbouring_state = {
				is_treaty_port = yes
			}
		}
		NOT = { has_global_variable = sun_yat_sen_spawn }
	}

	immediate = {
		create_character = {
			template = chi_sun_yat_sen_character_template
			on_created = {
				set_variable = sun_yat_sen_var
			}
		}
		random_scope_character = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = sun_yat_sen_var
			}
			save_scope_as = historic_agitator_scope
		}
		ruler = {
			save_scope_as = monarch_scope
		}
		set_global_variable = sun_yat_sen_spawn
		random_scope_state = {
			limit = {
				any_neighbouring_state = {
					is_treaty_port = yes
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = sunyatsen_state
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = historical_agitators.21.a
		default_option = yes
		scope:historic_agitator_scope = {
			exile_character_with_martyrdom = yes
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = historical_agitators.21.b
		show_as_tooltip = {
			create_character = {
				template = chi_sun_yat_sen_character_template
			}
		}
	}
}
